body:
## Summary

Implements the change-password endpoint for authenticated users.

Closes #25

## Changes

- src/routes/users.js: implement PUT /api/users/me/password — verifies old password with comparePassword, hashes new password with bcrypt, saves to DB
- src/middleware/validate.js: add changePasswordRules (oldPassword required, newPassword min 8 chars); also move import { body } to top of file (was incorrectly placed mid-file)

## Behaviour

| Case | Status |
|------|--------|
| Valid old password + new password ≥ 8 chars | 200 |
| Old password incorrect | 401 |
| Missing / too short new password | 400 |
| Invalid or missing JWT | 401 (via protect middleware) |
title: feat: implement PUT /api/users/me/password
